The '''XC2 administration droid''' was an model of [[Administrative droid/Legends|administrative droid]] made by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]]. [[Kina Margath]] used two of these [[Droid/Legends|units]] to help her manage [[Margath's on Elshandruu Pica]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
